name: Value Re-Anchoring Strategy (Early 2000s)
description: In a post-bubble environment characterized by severe deleveraging and speculative euphoria burnout, the strategy shifts decisively away from pure growth narratives. We prioritize capital preservation and invest in established moats, high-cash-flow enterprises, and foundational infrastructure. We treat market downturns as buying opportunities for proven quality over speculative momentum.

params.rationale: Establish a foundational position in resilient, dividend-paying value leaders immune to speculative shocks.
Execute on broad market dips. When the overall index drops significantly from recent peaks, reallocate to the general market recovery via SPY.

MSFT represents essential enterprise infrastructure. Buying on dips here provides exposure to the necessary digital transformation that withstands economic cycles better than consumer discretionary spending.
